prompt: A warm, healing anime illustration of a gentle older-sister type woman welcoming the viewer home at the apartment doorway at night, drawn in a soft romantic shoujo style with glowing amber indoor lighting, delicate linework, painterly shading, and a cozy emotional atmosphere. She is shown from a slightly low eye-level perspective, leaning forward as if opening the door and reaching one hand toward the viewer in invitation, creating an intimate first-person point of view. Her expression should feel tender, affectionate, and reassuring. She has deep brown long slightly damp-looking wavy hair, loosely tied back with soft strands framing her face. She wears a cream cable-knit cardigan with large buttons over a white camisole and a high-waisted brown pleated skirt with a ribbon tie. The background is a warmly lit home interior with wooden floor, soft curtains, a floor lamp, framed wall art, and potted plants, all slightly blurred to keep focus on her. Add subtle sparkles, floral lace corner decorations, and a thin ornamental border framing the entire image like a vintage character poster. Include prominent Japanese text integrated into the design: large vertical glowing text on the left reading "おかえり、今日もおつかれさま。", a small speech bubble near the upper right reading "ほら、こっちおいで♡", a smaller comforting line in a translucent box reading "ここでは、強がらなくていいよ。", and a large elegant name title at the bottom reading "白瀬まどか" with romanized subtitle "Shirase Madoka". At the bottom, include exactly 3 circular badge seals with the labels "やさしい", "癒し", and "包容力". Use a vertical poster composition, highly polished, sentimental, feminine, soothing, and designed to feel like the ideal person who comforts you when you come home.
